## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Set up adapter '...'
2. Call `connect` with '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment
- Rust version: [e.g. 1.82.0]
- pheno-port-adapter version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.5]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here, such as adapter type (TCP, Unix, etc.).
